message:
fix(linalg): replace bare a.len() != n*n shape checks with checked_mul to prevent overflow

16 shape-validation guards across lu_decompose, det_nxn, slogdet_nxn,
lu_solve_multi, lu_solve, solve_nxn_multi, solve_triangular, cholesky_nxn,
cholesky_solve, and cholesky_solve_multi were comparing a.len() against
n * n (or n * m) using bare multiplication, which could overflow on 32-bit
targets and pass validation for incorrect inputs. Now uses
n.checked_mul(n) wrapped in Some() comparison, which returns None on
overflow and correctly rejects the input.

No logic or algorithm changes — purely defensive input validation hardening.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
